description.ko: 고요한 고압의 세계, 심해의 영원한 어둠 속에서 생물 발광 생명체들이 신비롭게 빛나는 바다의 가장 깊은 곳을 탐험해 보세요.
description.en: Explore the mysterious depths of the deep ocean, where bioluminescent creatures illuminate the eternal darkness of the sea floor in a silent, high-pressure world.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a deep ocean abyss, AQUA-5 style, glowing bioluminescent jellyfish and rare deep-sea flora, dark turquoise and midnight blue tones, high pressure underwater atmosphere, particles of marine snow, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, ethereal lighting.
